# criblio_search_dataset_ruleset (Resource)

SearchDatasetRuleset Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_search_dataset_ruleset" "my_searchdatasetruleset" {
  id = "default"
  rules = [
    {
      dataset                   = "main"
      description               = "data catch all"
      disabled                  = false
      extend_expression         = "vendor = toupper(vendor)"
      extend_expression_enabled = true
      id                        = "default"
      kusto_expression          = "*"
      name                      = "main"
      send_data_to              = "destinationDataset"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Ruleset identifier. must be "default"
- `rules` (Attributes List) Rules evaluated in order for dataset routing and optional extend. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Optional:

- `dataset` (String) Dataset id when routing to a dataset; meaning depends on <code>sendDataTo</code>.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the rule.
- `disabled` (Boolean) When true, the rule is ignored for routing.
- `extend_expression` (String) KQL-style extend expression to add or transform fields on matched events.
- `extend_expression_enabled` (Boolean) Whether <code>extendExpression</code> is applied for this rule.
- `id` (String) Stable identifier for the rule. Not Null
- `kusto_expression` (String) Kusto predicate that selects events for this rule. Not Null
- `name` (String) Display name of the rule. Not Null
- `send_data_to` (String) Whether matching events are sent to a dataset or dropped (<code>destinationDataset</code> vs <code>drop</code>). possible known values include one of ["destinationDataset", "drop"]
